description: Style NoteIf comfort is on your mind, these sandals from nike Urban Float range will transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish, super comfy and lightweight, they will make you feel like you are walking on a bed of roses all day. Ruggedly crafted for casual wear with a tough outsole, you can team them with jeans or shorts and step out in style.Product DetailsSynthetic upper with forefoot and ankle loop straps for added comfortVelcro fasteners for ease in removal and wearing, and for a customized FitPhylon midsole with grooves on the footbedWell cushioned footbed for all-day comfortFabric lining for soft touch and protection from blistersLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionSquare lugs all over for excellent traction and grip on all surfacesFlex grooves for ease of movementWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareSyntheticUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
